title: scaphochlamys longipedunculata
intro: Scaphochlamys longipedunculata, also known as the long-stalked scaphochlamys, is a species of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Scaphochlamys longipedunculata include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, coughs, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
